##### Posterior draws

```{r}
#| label: fig-posterior-draws-pod-pa
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 5.5
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| out-width: 14cm
#| fig-cap: "**Dataset-level variation in the direction of community turnover for species and Functional turnover following Podani framework using presence-absence data**. Point intervals of posterior predictive distributions for dataset-level (n = 161) estimates of differences in the direction of community turnover. Positive values indicate a higher likelihood of homogenisation, while negative values indicate differentiation. Categorical predictors (italicized) are compared to reference categories: *terrestrial* for ecosystem type, *multiple* for main land-use type, *1 km* for buffer size in human footprint, and *0.5 km* for buffer size of habitat heterogeneity estimates. Predictors with credible intervals that do not overlap zero are considered significant and are shown in black. Point estimates indicate median values of posterior draws. The linewidths represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% highest density intervals (HDI), with levels of support classified as strong (95\\% HDI), moderate (89\\% HDI), weak (80\\% HDI), or no support (\\<80\\% HDI). Values represent parameter medians and their HDI ranges."
#| fig-pos: H

direction_figure_data_pod_pa <- generate_figure_data(direction_species_pod_pa, direction_traits_pod_pa, "direction", draw_min = -3, draw_max =8 )

# 1. Tag each row as either a draw or a text annotation
draws_df_pod_pa <- direction_figure_data_pod_pa |>
  mutate(layer = " ")

text_df_pod_pa <- direction_figure_data_pod_pa |>
  distinct(parameter, facet, text, draw_min, draw_max) |>
  # position text slightly beyond the max draw
  mutate(posterior = draw_max * 1.05,
         layer     = "  ")

plot_df_pod_pa <- bind_rows(draws_df_pod_pa, text_df_pod_pa) |>
  mutate(layer = factor(layer, levels = c(" ", "  ")))

# 2. Compute x‐limits
draw_limits <- range(plot_df_pod_pa$draw_min, plot_df_pod_pa$draw_max, na.rm = TRUE)
# give the text panel a bit of extra room to the right
text_limits <- c(draw_limits[1], draw_limits[2] * 1.15)
# 3. Build the plot

ggplot(plot_df_pod_pa) +
  facet_nested(
    ~facet+layer,
    scales      = "free_x",
    space       = "free_x",
    strip       = strip_nested(by_layer_y = TRUE)    # ← drop the Posterior/Text strip
  ) +
  # posterior draws + intervals
  stat_pointinterval(
    data    = ~ .x |>  filter(layer == " "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, colour = significant),
    .width = c(.8, .89, .95)
  ) +
  # text labels
  geom_text(
    data    =~ .x |> filter(layer == "  "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, label = text),
    hjust   = 0,
    size    = 3
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  # nested facets: rows = Posterior/Text, cols = your facet (Species vs Trait)
  # per‐strip x scales
  facetted_pos_scales(
    x = list(
      # for the Posterior strip
      layer == " " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        name   = "Posterior draws",
        expand = expansion(mult = 0.1)
      ),
      # for the Text strip
      layer == "  " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        limits = c(8,13),
        breaks=NULL,
        name   = NULL,
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
      )
    )
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("gray60", "black")) +
  theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.background    = element_blank(),
    panel.background =  element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face="bold",angle=90,size=12),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face="bold",size=12),,
    axis.title.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 10, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    axis.title.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x        = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x       = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.tag           = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2, unit="mm"),
    plot.title= element_text(face="bold",size=12)
  ) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  ) 

```

##### Contrasts (Main land use type)

```{r}
#| label: fig-pod-pa-contrast
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-cap: "**Pairwise contrasts in the direction of community turnover among land-use types.** Posterior contrasts for the direction of community turnover (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) across land-use categories following the Podani framework using abundance data. Positive values indicate a stronger signal of homogenisation in the first land-use type relative to the second. Points represent posterior medians and horizontal bars show 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H
species_contrast_pod_pa<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_species_pod_pa,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

trait_contrast_pod_pa<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_traits_pod_pa,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

Figure_14a<-
  species_contrast_pod_pa |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(species_contrast_pod_pa, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
  
# Create the plot

Figure_14b <- trait_contrast_pod_pa |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(trait_contrast_pod_pa, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
  
Figure_14a/Figure_14b
```

##### Random effect estimates

```{r}
#| label: fig-pod-pa-dir-rf
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| out-width: 13cm
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: "**Taxon-level deviations in the direction of community turnover.** Random-effect estimates from the direction models (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) showing taxon-specific deviations from the overall model intercept for species and Functional turnover following Podani framework using presence-absence data. Positive values indicate stronger homogenisation signals relative to the global mean, while negative values reflect stronger differentiation. Points denote posterior medians and horizontal bars represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H

# Prepare and summarize data
direction_species_re_pod_pa <- direction_species_pod_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]")) |> 
    mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

direction_traits_re_pod_pa <- direction_traits_pod_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]"))  |> 
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

# Plot
Figure_15a <- direction_species_pod_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_species_re_pod_pa,
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) 


Figure_15b <- direction_traits_pod_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Functional turnover") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_traits_re_pod_pa |> mutate(taxa_coarse =   str_to_title(taxa_coarse)),
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) 

Figure_15a / Figure_15b
```

### Baselga

#### Abundance

##### Posterior predictions

```{r}
#| label: Baselga_abun_posterior_predictions
#| include: false
direction_species_bas_abun<- read_rds(here::here("S7_Model_outputs_figures_and_tables/model/Baselga/Abundance/direction/direction_species_base.rds"))
direction_traits_bas_abun<- read_rds(here::here("S7_Model_outputs_figures_and_tables/model/Baselga/Abundance/direction/direction_traits_base.rds"))

best_model_species <- direction_species_bas_abun
best_model_traits <- direction_traits_bas_abun

model_data<- readxl::read_excel("S6_Synthesis_model/data/synthesis_data.xlsx") |> 
  dplyr::filter(!dataset %in% c("N67TTP", "N78TTP", "S47TTP")) |> 
  rename(framework = "beta_type",
         feature = "metric_type") |> 
  filter(framework == "Baselga", feature == "abun") |> 
  mutate(facet = ifelse(facet == "Taxonomic","Species","Traits")) |> 
  rename(direction_harrel_davis = harrel_davis)

species_draws_eco <- predictions(
  best_model_species,
  newdata = datagrid(ecosystem_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Taxonomic turnover")

trait_draws_eco <- predictions(
  best_model_traits,
  newdata = datagrid(ecosystem_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Functional turnover")

pred_eco_type <- bind_rows(species_draws_eco, trait_draws_eco) |>
  select(draw, ecosystem_type, facet) |>
  mutate(
    facet = factor(facet,
                   levels = c("Taxonomic turnover",
                              "Functional turnover")),
    ecosystem_type = factor(ecosystem_type, levels = c("Freshwater","Terrestrial"))
  )|> 
  mutate(level="Ecosystem type")


#Land use values 


species_draws_lu <- predictions(
  best_model_species,
  newdata = datagrid(main_land_use_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Taxonomic turnover")

trait_draws_lu <- predictions(
  best_model_traits,
  newdata = datagrid(main_land_use_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Functional turnover")

pred_main_lu <- bind_rows(species_draws_lu, trait_draws_lu) |>
  select(draw, main_land_use_type, facet) |>
  mutate(
    facet = factor(facet,
                   levels = c("Taxonomic turnover",
                              "Functional turnover")),
    main_land_use_type = factor(main_land_use_type, levels = rev(c("Agriculture", "Forest", "Urban", "Multiple")))
  ) |> 
  mutate(level="Main land use")


# Define colors outside the individual figures
blue_green <- c(Freshwater = "#118ab2", Terrestrial = "#06d6a0")
land_use_colors <- c(Agriculture = "#a36627", Forest = "#848c04", Urban = "#1c1c0c", Multiple = "#dc7c5c")


annotations_df <- data.frame(
  label = c(
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>",
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>"
  ),
  x = c(-0.03, 0.03, -7, -7),
  y = c(6.5, 6.5, -0.2, 0.2),
  angle = c(0, 0, 90, 90),
  hjust = c(1, 0, 1, 0)
)

```

```{r}
#| label: fig-pred-bas-abun-dir
#| fig-cap: "**Direction of community turnover across ecosystem and land-use types**. a, Dataset-level Harrell–Davis Δr² values for species and Functional turnover under the Baselga framework with abundance data (n = 161 datasets). Positive values indicate stronger support for homogenisation, negative values indicate differentiation. b–c, Posterior predictions from multilevel models for Δr² values by ecosystem type (b) and dominant land use (c). Points show posterior medians; bars show 80%, 89%, and 95% highest-density intervals (HDIs). Intervals excluding zero indicate a consistent directional tendency."
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| out-width: 15cm
#| fig-pos: H

p1<-model_data |>
  select(dataset, facet, direction_harrel_davis) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = facet, values_from = direction_harrel_davis) |>
  ggplot(aes(y = Species, x = Traits)) +
  geom_richtext(
    data = annotations_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, angle = angle, hjust = hjust), 
    size=convert_size(12),
    label.color = NA,
    inherit.aes=FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = .7) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-7, NA), ylim = c(-10, 7),clip="on") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = 3,
             linewidth = .1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = 3,
             linewidth = .1) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 5)
    ),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(t = 5)
    ),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      angle = 90,
      margin = margin(r = 4)
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      color = "grey30",
      margin = margin(t = 5)
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      color = "grey30",
    ),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  labs(
    x   = "Standardised difference in model fit<br><br><b>Functional turnover</b>",
    y   = "<b>Taxonomic turnover</b><br><br>Standardised difference in model fit",
    tag = "a"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-6.5, -4.5, -2.5, 0, 2.5))+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )

annotations_p2 <- data.frame(
  label = c(
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>"
  ),
  x      = rep(c(-0.03,  0.03),2),   # tweak these to your actual x‐limits
  y      = c( 2.5,     2.5,2.5,2.5),   # y position above your points
  angle  = c( 0,     0,0,0   ),
  hjust  = c( 1,     0,1,0   ),
  facet  = c("Taxonomic turnover", "Taxonomic turnover", "Functional turnover","Functional turnover")  # or repeat for "Trait replacement"
) |>  mutate(facet = factor(facet,levels=c("Taxonomic turnover","Functional turnover")))


p2<- ggplot(pred_eco_type, aes(y = ecosystem_type, x = draw, colour = ecosystem_type)) +
  stat_pointinterval(.width = c(.8, .9, .95)) +
  geom_richtext(
    data = annotations_p2,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, angle = angle, hjust = hjust), 
    size=convert_size(10),
    label.color = NA,
    inherit.aes=FALSE
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 3) +
  facet_grid(~facet)+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(blue_green, land_use_colors)) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=2)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=2)),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5),hjust=1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(3, 0, 3, 0, unit="mm"),
    legend.position="none",
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14)
  )+
  scale_y_discrete(expand=c(.1,1), labels=c("Freshwater (n=30)","Terrestrial (n=131)"))+
  labs(x="",tag="b")+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-3,3),clip="off")

p3<- ggplot(pred_main_lu, aes(y = main_land_use_type, x = draw, colour = main_land_use_type)) +
  stat_pointinterval(.width = c(.8, .9, .95)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 3) +
  facet_grid(~facet)+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(blue_green, land_use_colors)) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=2),hjust=1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(3, 0, 3, 0, unit="mm"),
    legend.position="none",
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14)
  )+
  scale_y_discrete(labels=rev(c("Agriculture (n=38)","Forest (n=56)", "Urban (n=15)","Multiple (n=52)")))+
  labs(x="Standardised difference in model fit<br><br><b>Posterior predictions</b>",tag="c")+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-5,8),clip="off")

p1|(p2/p3)
```

##### Posterior draws

```{r}
#| label: fig-posterior-draws-bas-abun
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 5.5
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| out-width: 14cm
#| fig-cap: "**Dataset-level variation in the direction of community turnover for species and Functional turnover following Baselga framework using abundance data**. Point intervals of posterior predictive distributions for dataset-level (n = 161) estimates of differences in the direction of community turnover. Positive values indicate a higher likelihood of homogenisation, while negative values indicate differentiation. Categorical predictors (italicized) are compared to reference categories: *terrestrial* for ecosystem type, *multiple* for main land-use type, *1 km* for buffer size in human footprint, and *0.5 km* for buffer size of habitat heterogeneity estimates. Predictors with credible intervals that do not overlap zero are considered significant and are shown in black. Point estimates indicate median values of posterior draws. The linewidths represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% highest density intervals (HDI), with levels of support classified as strong (95\\% HDI), moderate (89\\% HDI), weak (80\\% HDI), or no support (\\<80\\% HDI). Values represent parameter medians and their HDI ranges."
#| fig-pos: H

direction_figure_data_bas_abun <- generate_figure_data(direction_species_bas_abun, direction_traits_bas_abun, "direction", draw_min = -3, draw_max =8 )

# 1. Tag each row as either a draw or a text annotation
draws_df_bas_abun <- direction_figure_data_bas_abun |>
  mutate(layer = " ")

text_df_bas_abun <- direction_figure_data_bas_abun |>
  distinct(parameter, facet, text, draw_min, draw_max) |>
  # position text slightly beyond the max draw
  mutate(posterior = draw_max * 1.05,
         layer     = "  ")

plot_df_bas_abun <- bind_rows(draws_df_bas_abun, text_df_bas_abun) |>
  mutate(layer = factor(layer, levels = c(" ", "  ")))

# 2. Compute x‐limits
draw_limits <- range(plot_df_bas_abun$draw_min, plot_df_bas_abun$draw_max, na.rm = TRUE)
# give the text panel a bit of extra room to the right
text_limits <- c(draw_limits[1], draw_limits[2] * 1.15)
# 3. Build the plot
Figure_17 <- ggplot(plot_df_bas_abun) +
  facet_nested(
    ~facet+layer,
    scales      = "free_x",
    space       = "free_x",
    strip       = strip_nested(by_layer_y = TRUE)    # ← drop the Posterior/Text strip
  ) +
  # posterior draws + intervals
  stat_pointinterval(
    data    = ~ .x |>  filter(layer == " "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, colour = significant),
    .width = c(.8, .89, .95)
  ) +
  # text labels
  geom_text(
    data    =~ .x |> filter(layer == "  "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, label = text),
    hjust   = 0,
    size    = 3
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  # nested facets: rows = Posterior/Text, cols = your facet (Species vs Trait)
  # per‐strip x scales
  facetted_pos_scales(
    x = list(
      # for the Posterior strip
      layer == " " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        name   = "Posterior draws",
        expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)
      ),
      # for the Text strip
      layer == "  " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        limits = c(8,13),
        breaks=NULL,
        name   = NULL,
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
      )
    )
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("gray60", "black")) +
  theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.background    = element_blank(),
    panel.background =  element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face="bold",angle=90,size=12),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face="bold",size=12),,
    axis.title.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 10, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 12),
    axis.title.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x        = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x       = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.tag           = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2, unit="mm"),
    plot.title= element_text(face="bold",size=12)
  ) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2.5,7.5,by=2.5))

Figure_17
```

##### Contrasts (Main land use type)

```{r}
#| label: fig-bas-abun-contr-dir
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| out-width: 13cm
#| out-height: 10cm
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: "**Pairwise contrasts in the direction of community turnover among land-use types.** Posterior contrasts for the direction of community turnover (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) across land-use categories following the Baselga framework using abundance data. Positive values indicate a stronger signal of homogenisation in the first land-use type relative to the second. Points represent posterior medians and horizontal bars show 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H
species_contrast_bas_abun<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_species_bas_abun,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

trait_contrast_bas_abun<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_traits_bas_abun,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

Figure_18a<-
  species_contrast_bas_abun |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(species_contrast_bas_abun, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
  
# Create the plot

Figure_18b <- trait_contrast_bas_abun |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(trait_contrast_bas_abun, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
```

##### Random effect estimates

```{r}
#| label: fig-bas-abun-dir-rf
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| out-width: 13cm
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: "**Taxon-level deviations in the direction of community turnover.** Random-effect estimates from the direction models (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) showing taxon-specific deviations from the overall model intercept for species and Functional turnover following Baselga framework using abundance data. Positive values indicate stronger homogenisation signals relative to the global mean, while negative values reflect stronger differentiation. Points denote posterior medians and horizontal bars represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H 
# Prepare and summarize data
direction_species_re_bas_abun <- direction_species_bas_abun |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]")) |> 
    mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

direction_traits_re_bas_abun <- direction_traits_bas_abun |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]"))  |> 
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

# Plot
Figure_19a <- direction_species_bas_abun |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_species_re_bas_abun,
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) 


Figure_19b <- direction_traits_bas_abun |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Functional turnover") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_traits_re_bas_abun |> mutate(taxa_coarse =   str_to_title(taxa_coarse)),
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  )
```

#### Presence-absence

##### Posterior predictions

```{r prep-data-post-pred-dir-bas-pa}
#| include: false
direction_species_bas_pa<- read_rds(here::here("S7_Model_outputs_figures_and_tables/model/Baselga/Presence_absence/direction/direction_species_base.rds"))
direction_traits_bas_pa<- read_rds(here::here("S7_Model_outputs_figures_and_tables/model/Baselga/Presence_absence/direction/direction_traits_base.rds"))

best_model_species <- direction_species_bas_pa
best_model_traits <- direction_traits_bas_pa

model_data<- readxl::read_excel("S6_Synthesis_model/data/synthesis_data.xlsx") |> 
  dplyr::filter(!dataset %in% c("N67TTP", "N78TTP", "S47TTP")) |> 
  rename(framework = "beta_type",
         feature = "metric_type") |> 
  filter(framework == "Baselga", feature == "pa") |> 
  mutate(facet = ifelse(facet == "Taxonomic","Species","Traits")) |> 
    rename(direction_harrel_davis = harrel_davis)

species_draws_eco <- predictions(
  best_model_species,
  newdata = datagrid(ecosystem_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Taxonomic turnover")

trait_draws_eco <- predictions(
  best_model_traits,
  newdata = datagrid(ecosystem_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Functional turnover")

pred_eco_type <- bind_rows(species_draws_eco, trait_draws_eco) |>
  select(draw, ecosystem_type, facet) |>
  mutate(
    facet = factor(facet,
                   levels = c("Taxonomic turnover",
                              "Functional turnover")),
    ecosystem_type = factor(ecosystem_type, levels = c("Freshwater","Terrestrial"))
  )|> 
  mutate(level="Ecosystem type")


#Land use values 


species_draws_lu <- predictions(
  best_model_species,
  newdata = datagrid(main_land_use_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Taxonomic turnover")

trait_draws_lu <- predictions(
  best_model_traits,
  newdata = datagrid(main_land_use_type=unique),
  re_formula = NA,
  type = "response"
) |>
  posterior_draws() |>
  mutate(facet = "Functional turnover")

pred_main_lu <- bind_rows(species_draws_lu, trait_draws_lu) |>
  select(draw, main_land_use_type, facet) |>
  mutate(
    facet = factor(facet,
                   levels = c("Taxonomic turnover",
                              "Functional turnover")),
    main_land_use_type = factor(main_land_use_type, levels = rev(c("Agriculture", "Forest", "Urban", "Multiple")))
  ) |> 
  mutate(level="Main land use")


# Define colors outside the individual figures
blue_green <- c(Freshwater = "#118ab2", Terrestrial = "#06d6a0")
land_use_colors <- c(Agriculture = "#a36627", Forest = "#848c04", Urban = "#1c1c0c", Multiple = "#dc7c5c")


annotations_df <- data.frame(
  label = c(
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>",
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>"
  ),
  x = c(-0.03, 0.03, -7, -7),
  y = c(6.5, 6.5, -0.2, 0.2),
  angle = c(0, 0, 90, 90),
  hjust = c(1, 0, 1, 0)
)

```

```{r}
#| label: fig-pred-bas-pa-dir
#| fig-cap: "**Direction of community turnover across ecosystem and land-use types**. a, Dataset-level Harrell–Davis Δr² values for species and Functional turnover under the Baselga framework with presence-absence data (n = 161 datasets). Positive values indicate stronger support for homogenisation, negative values indicate differentiation. b–c, Posterior predictions from multilevel models for Δr² values by ecosystem type (b) and dominant land use (c). Points show posterior medians; bars show 80%, 89%, and 95% highest-density intervals (HDIs). Intervals excluding zero indicate a consistent directional tendency."
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| out-width: 15cm
#| fig-pos: H

p1<-model_data |>
  select(dataset, facet, direction_harrel_davis) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = facet, values_from = direction_harrel_davis) |>
  ggplot(aes(y = Species, x = Traits)) +
  geom_richtext(
    data = annotations_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, angle = angle, hjust = hjust), 
    size=convert_size(12),
    label.color = NA,
    inherit.aes=FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = .7) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-7, NA), ylim = c(-10, 7),clip="on") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
             linetype = 3,
             linewidth = .1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = 3,
             linewidth = .1) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 5)
    ),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(t = 5)
    ),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      angle = 90,
      margin = margin(r = 4)
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      color = "grey30",
      margin = margin(t = 5)
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(
      family = "sans",
      color = "grey30",
    ),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  labs(
    x   = "Standardised difference in model fit<br><br><b>Functional turnover</b>",
    y   = "<b>Taxonomic turnover</b><br><br>Standardised difference in model fit",
    tag = "a"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-6.5, -4.5, -2.5, 0, 2.5))+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )

annotations_p2 <- data.frame(
  label = c(
    "<span>&larr; Dissimilarity</span>",
    "<span>Similarity &rarr;</span>"
  ),
  x      = rep(c(-0.03,  0.03),2),   # tweak these to your actual x‐limits
  y      = c( 2.5,     2.5,2.5,2.5),   # y position above your points
  angle  = c( 0,     0,0,0   ),
  hjust  = c( 1,     0,1,0   ),
  facet  = c("Taxonomic turnover", "Taxonomic turnover", "Functional turnover","Functional turnover")  # or repeat for "Trait replacement"
) |>  mutate(facet = factor(facet,levels=c("Taxonomic turnover","Functional turnover")))


p2<- ggplot(pred_eco_type, aes(y = ecosystem_type, x = draw, colour = ecosystem_type)) +
  stat_pointinterval(.width = c(.8, .9, .95)) +
  geom_richtext(
    data = annotations_p2,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, angle = angle, hjust = hjust), 
    size=convert_size(10),
    label.color = NA,
    inherit.aes=FALSE
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 3) +
  facet_grid(~facet)+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(blue_green, land_use_colors)) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=2)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=2)),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5),hjust=1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(3, 0, 3, 0, unit="mm"),
    legend.position="none",
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14)
  )+
  scale_y_discrete(expand=c(.1,1), labels=c("Freshwater (n=30)","Terrestrial (n=131)"))+
  labs(x="",tag="b")+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-3,3),clip="off")

p3<- ggplot(pred_main_lu, aes(y = main_land_use_type, x = draw, colour = main_land_use_type)) +
  stat_pointinterval(.width = c(.8, .9, .95)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 3) +
  facet_grid(~facet)+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(blue_green, land_use_colors)) +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", hjust = 0.5, size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=2),hjust=1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans", size = 12, margin=margin(t=5)),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth=0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(3, 0, 3, 0, unit="mm"),
    legend.position="none",
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14)
  )+
  scale_y_discrete(labels=rev(c("Agriculture (n=38)","Forest (n=56)", "Urban (n=15)","Multiple (n=52)")))+
  labs(x="Standardised difference in model fit<br><br><b>Posterior predictions</b>",tag="c")+
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-5,8),clip="off")

p1|(p2/p3)
```

##### Posterior draws

```{r}
#| label: fig-posterior-draws-bas-pa
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 5.5
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| out-width: 14cm
#| fig-cap: "**Dataset-level variation in the direction of community turnover for species and Functional turnover following Baselga framework using presence-absence data**. Point intervals of posterior predictive distributions for dataset-level (n = 161) estimates of differences in the direction of community turnover. Positive values indicate a higher likelihood of homogenisation, while negative values indicate differentiation. Categorical predictors (italicized) are compared to reference categories: *terrestrial* for ecosystem type, *multiple* for main land-use type, *1 km* for buffer size in human footprint, and *0.5 km* for buffer size of habitat heterogeneity estimates. Predictors with credible intervals that do not overlap zero are considered significant and are shown in black. Point estimates indicate median values of posterior draws. The linewidths represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% highest density intervals (HDI), with levels of support classified as strong (95\\% HDI), moderate (89\\% HDI), weak (80\\% HDI), or no support (\\<80\\% HDI). Values represent parameter medians and their HDI ranges. "
#| fig-pos: H

direction_figure_data_bas_pa <- generate_figure_data(direction_species_bas_pa, direction_traits_bas_pa, "direction", draw_min = -3, draw_max =8 )

# 1. Tag each row as either a draw or a text annotation
draws_df_bas_pa <- direction_figure_data_bas_pa |>
  mutate(layer = " ")

text_df_bas_pa <- direction_figure_data_bas_pa |>
  distinct(parameter, facet, text, draw_min, draw_max) |>
  # position text slightly beyond the max draw
  mutate(posterior = draw_max * 1.05,
         layer     = "  ")

plot_df_bas_pa <- bind_rows(draws_df_bas_pa, text_df_bas_pa) |>
  mutate(layer = factor(layer, levels = c(" ", "  ")))

# 2. Compute x‐limits
draw_limits <- range(plot_df_bas_pa$draw_min, plot_df_bas_pa$draw_max, na.rm = TRUE)
# give the text panel a bit of extra room to the right
text_limits <- c(draw_limits[1], draw_limits[2] * 1.15)
# 3. Build the plot
Figure_21 <- ggplot(plot_df_bas_pa) +
  facet_nested(
    ~facet+layer,
    scales      = "free_x",
    space       = "free_x",
    strip       = strip_nested(by_layer_y = TRUE)    # ← drop the Posterior/Text strip
  ) +
  # posterior draws + intervals
  stat_pointinterval(
    data    = ~ .x |>  filter(layer == " "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, colour = significant),
    .width = c(.8, .89, .95)
  ) +
  # text labels
  geom_text(
    data    =~ .x |> filter(layer == "  "),
    aes(x = posterior, y = parameter, label = text),
    hjust   = 0,
    size    = 3
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  # nested facets: rows = Posterior/Text, cols = your facet (Species vs Trait)
  # per‐strip x scales
  facetted_pos_scales(
    x = list(
      # for the Posterior strip
      layer == " " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        name   = "Posterior draws",
        expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)
      ),
      # for the Text strip
      layer == "  " ~ scale_x_continuous(
        limits = c(8,13),
        breaks=NULL,
        name   = NULL,
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
      )
    )
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("gray60", "black")) +
  theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.background    = element_blank(),
    panel.background =  element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face="bold",angle=90,size=12),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face="bold",size=12),,
    axis.title.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 10, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x        = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 12),
    axis.title.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x        = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x       = element_line(color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.tag           = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2, unit="mm"),
    plot.title= element_text(face="bold",size=12)
  ) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2.5,7.5,by=2.5))

Figure_21
```

##### Contrasts (Main land use type)

```{r}
#| label: fig-bas-pa-contr-dir
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| out-width: 13cm
#| out-height: 10cm
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: "**Pairwise contrasts in the direction of community turnover among land-use types.** Posterior contrasts for the direction of community turnover (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) across land-use categories following the Baselga framework using presence-absence data. Positive values indicate a stronger signal of homogenisation in the first land-use type relative to the second. Points represent posterior medians and horizontal bars show 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H
species_contrast_bas_pa<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_species_bas_pa,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

trait_contrast_bas_pa<- avg_comparisons(
  direction_traits_bas_pa,
  variables = list(main_land_use_type = "pairwise"),
  re_formula = NA,
  type       = "response",
  conf_level = .95
)  |> 
  posterior_draws() |> 
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(estimate,2)} [{round(conf.low,2)},{round(conf.high,2)}]")) |> 
  separate_wider_delim(contrast,delim="-",names=c("var1","var2")) |> 
  mutate(across(var1:var2, ~ gsub("^\\s*mean\\((.*?)\\)\\s*$", "\\1", .x))) |>
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  mutate(comparison = paste0(var1,"-",var2))  |> 
  mutate(comparison = fct_reorder(comparison,estimate)) |> 
  arrange(comparison)

Figure_22a<-
  species_contrast_bas_pa |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(species_contrast_bas_pa, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
  
# Create the plot

Figure_22b <- trait_contrast_bas_pa |> 
  ggplot(aes(y=comparison,x=draw))+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  stat_pointinterval(.width=c(.8,.89,.95))+
  facet_wrap(~facet, ncol=1) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = distinct(trait_contrast_bas_pa, comparison,.keep_all=TRUE) |>  pull(var1)) +
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison,x=conf.high, label=label),hjust=-.1)+
  geom_text(data=~.x |> distinct(comparison,.keep_all=TRUE),
            aes(y=comparison, label=var2),x=12,hjust=0, colour = "gray30", size=convert_size(12))+
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2,0,2,4,6,8,10))+
   coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, 15), clip = 'off') +
    guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = TRUE),
    y = guide_axis(cap = TRUE)
  )+
  labs(x="Posterior draws",y="")
```

##### Random effect estimates

```{r}
#| label: fig-bas-pa-dir-rf
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| out-width: 13cm
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: "**Taxon-level deviations in the direction of community turnover.** Random-effect estimates from the direction models (Harrell–Davis $\\Delta r^{2}$) showing taxon-specific deviations from the overall model intercept for species and Functional turnover following Baselga framework using presence-absence data. Positive values indicate stronger homogenisation signals relative to the global mean, while negative values reflect stronger differentiation. Points denote posterior medians and horizontal bars represent 80\\%, 89\\%, and 95\\% credible intervals."
#| fig-pos: H


# Prepare and summarize data
direction_species_re_bas_pa <- direction_species_bas_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]")) |> 
    mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

direction_traits_re_bas_pa <- direction_traits_bas_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  group_by(taxa_coarse) |>
  median_qi(r_taxa_coarse, .width = 0.95) |>
  mutate(label = glue::glue("{round(r_taxa_coarse, 2)} [{round(.lower, 2)}, {round(.upper, 2)}]"))  |> 
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate")))

# Plot
Figure_23a <- direction_species_bas_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Taxonomic turnover") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_species_re_bas_pa,
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  ) 


Figure_23b <- direction_traits_bas_pa |>
  spread_draws(r_taxa_coarse[taxa_coarse, Intercept]) |>
  mutate(taxa_coarse = stringr::str_to_title(taxa_coarse)) |>
    mutate(taxa_coarse = factor(taxa_coarse, levels=c("Microorganism","Plant","Invertebrate","Vertebrate"))) |> 
  mutate(facet="Functional turnover") |>
  
  ggplot(aes(x = r_taxa_coarse, y = fct_rev(taxa_coarse))) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(.8, .89, .95), fill = "gray70", slab_color = NA) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype=3)+
  geom_text(data = direction_traits_re_bas_pa |> mutate(taxa_coarse =   str_to_title(taxa_coarse)),
            aes(label = label, x = .upper + .05),
            hjust = 0, vjust=-1, size = 3.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet)+
  labs(x = "Posterior estimate (taxon-specific deviation)", y = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-5, 5), clip = "on") +
  ggplot2::theme_void(base_family = "sans", base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold",size=12,margin = margin(b=5)),
    axis.title.x = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",hjust = 0.5,margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "sans",face = "bold",angle = 90,margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30",margin = margin(t = 5)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(family = "sans",color = "grey30"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin =  margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
    plot.tag = element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    legend.position = "none",
  )
```
